# absoluteTime

**Instance Property**

The absolute time of the timestamp, which is the value of the mach absolute time clock.

## Declaration

```swift
var absoluteTime: UInt64 { get }
```

## Mach Absolute Time

- **absoluteTimeNanoSeconds**: The nanoseconds component of the absolute time.

items.description: The nanoseconds component of the absolute time.
items.name: absoluteTimeNanoSeconds
